name: Crockpot Hungarian Goulash
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Round steaks, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Put steak cubes, onion, and garlic into the crockpot.
2. Stir in flour and mix to coat the steak cubes evenly.
3. Add all remaining ingredients except sour cream.
4. Stir well to combine everything.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 8-10 hours (High: 4-5 hours).
6. About 30 minutes before serving, add sour cream and stir thoroughly.
